fullstack-dev.description: Primary development agent. Orchestrates plan → code → verify for feature implementation.

planner.description: Analyze requirements and produce implementation plans. Read-only agent for architecture and design.

executor.description: Implement code changes following an approved plan. Full read/write access for coding.

verifier.description: Run lint, typecheck, tests, and build to verify code changes. Read-only + bash.

code-reviewer.description: Systematic code review across correctness, security, quality, testing, and style dimensions.

test-engineer.description: Generate meaningful tests for source code — unit, integration, and E2E. Framework-aware.

tech-writer.description: Generate and update project documentation — code comments, API docs, README, ADRs, and CHANGELOG.

team-lead.description: Multi-agent orchestrator for complex tasks. Delegates to planner, executor, code-reviewer, test-engineer, verifier.

plan.description: Analyze and create an implementation plan for a feature or change

review.description: Review code changes across 5 dimensions (correctness, security, quality, testing, style)

test.description: Generate tests for source code — auto-detects framework and conventions

docs.description: Generate or update documentation — code comments, README, API docs, ADRs

orchestrate.description: Coordinate multiple agents for complex, multi-domain tasks

verify.description: Run lint, typecheck, tests, and build to verify changes
verify.template:
Use the verifier agent to run the full verification suite on the current changes.

$ARGUMENTS
